sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46000" key="e(ya/ndra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑψ-άνδρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀνήρ</etym>) <sense id="n46000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cooking up men</tr_>, epith. of Medea, from her renewing old Aeson, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.26.5</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
